subject: report:session-complete
body:
🤖 Session Report — Windows Compat + 60-Bug Audit COMPLETE

✅ FIXED THIS SESSION (13 bugs):
• /tmp/ paths → os.tmpdir() ×5 files (body-bridge, jit-control, thought-loop, bot.js)
• omc-adapter.js: Promise/callback crash → .then() chain (CRITICAL)
• mdes-gang.ps1: hardcoded C:\Users\admin → $env:USERNAME
• hermes.json token: literal ${OLLAMA_TOKEN} → env fallback
• Model drift: gemma4:e4b → gemma4:26b (ecosystem, bot comment)
• soma.json: claude-opus-4.6 → claude-opus-4-7
• multi-proxy.py: ThaiLLM + Local Ollama backends, Anthropic bridge, GPT-5.4+ fix
• jit-switch.ps1: created 35-model switcher (5 providers)
• consciousness.yaml: filled from 1 line to full soul config

🔴 BLOCKED (human action required):
• Rotate DISCORD_TOKEN, OLLAMA_TOKEN, CODEX_API_KEY (exposed in git history)
• Fill THAILLM_TOKEN= in .env (Typhoon API key)
• Set JIT_REPORT_CHANNEL_ID in .env
• Run git commit (PowerShell unavailable this session)

📄 Post-mortem: changelog/2026-05-29-windows-compat-60bugs-postmortem.md
🖥️ Dashboard: src/jit-dashboard.html (Manus-style, 14 agents, 35 models, dark theme)

--- signed: jit-oracle (AI) ---
